__inputs.name: DS_PROMETHEUS
__inputs.label: Prometheus
__inputs.description: Prometheus datasource scraping the WAF++ Pushgateway.

description: WAF++ PASS compliance monitoring — risk scores, control status, and run-to-run change tracking.

options.content:
WAF++ PASS — Compliance Monitor
IaC security & compliance posture · powered by waf2p.dev · data via Prometheus Pushgateway

panels.title: Risk Score
panels.description: 0 = fully compliant · 100 = all critical controls failing

targets.expr: sum by(iac_plugin, source)(max by(iac_plugin, source, status)(wafpass_controls_total{iac_plugin=~"$iac_plugin", source=~"$source"}))

panels.title: Risk Score per Pillar (0 = clean, 100 = all failing)
panels.description: Higher = more failing controls in that pillar (weighted by severity).

panels.title: Control Status (current)
panels.description: Live view of every control. Red = FAIL. Use column headers to sort and filter.

targets.expr: max by(iac_plugin, source, control_id, severity, pillar)(wafpass_control_status{iac_plugin=~"$iac_plugin", source=~"$source"})

panels.title: Individual Checks by Status Over Time
Score History per Run
panels.description: Historical WAF++ scores.  Each row is one Prometheus scrape that captured a change.  Use the time range selector to zoom in or out.

title: WAF++ PASS — Compliance Monitor
